title: Compiled Bundle Format Contract (Phase 0 contract lock)
description: The compiled bundle is the artifact handed to a model executor. Phase 0 locks only the format contract: canonical-JSON posture, semantic version, signature metadata for forward Ed25519 verification, and a compatibility-check posture. The bundle body shape is intentionally permissive in Phase 0; later phases narrow it.

bundle_version.description: Semantic version of the bundle artifact itself.

manifest_id.description: The manifest_id this bundle was assembled under. Bundle and manifest are paired 1:1.

content_hash.description: Hash of the canonical-JSON serialization of body.

key_id.description: Identifier of the signing key. May be empty in Phase 0 because signing is not yet active.

value.description: Hex- or base64-encoded signature. May be empty in Phase 0; the field is reserved.

signed.description: Phase 0 always emits false. Later phases set true once Ed25519 signing is active. The field is mandatory so consumers can branch unconditionally.

body.description: Bundle body. Phase 0 only requires it to be an object; later phases narrow this.
